meta.title: Parrit.ai — Intelligent automation solutions for businesses
meta.description: Your company, with half the repetitive tasks starting today. AI-powered process automation. Built in France.
meta.ogTitle: Parrit.ai — Your teams deserve better than copy-paste
meta.ogDescription: Custom AI agents to automate your repetitive processes. Free 15-minute diagnostic.
meta.schemaDescription: Intelligent automation solutions for businesses. Half the repetitive tasks, starting today.

hero.subtitle: We design and deploy bespoke solutions that accelerate your growth, for the long run.
hero.ctaMicro: No commitment · One of our advisors will reach out

chatVoice.title: Or tell us directly about your need
chatVoice.subtitle: Describe your case out loud or in writing. We scope it with you, and take it from there.
chatVoice.micHint: Click to speak, or type your message
chatVoice.voiceUnsupported: Voice input isn't supported on this browser. Type your message.
chatVoice.voiceDenied: Microphone access denied. Type your message.
chatVoice.leadIntro: So we can prep a proposal for you, drop your first name and email.
chatVoice.leadThanks: Got it! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
chatVoice.leadError: Something broke. Try again or email paul.larmaraud@parrit.ai.
chatVoice.greeting: Hi! Give us your context: what company, what size, and what pain do you want gone?

models.title: Per project
bullets: Fixed budget, clear scope, no hidden fees
Stage-based payment — you validate results before moving on

models.title: Performance-based
bullets: Labor savings — share of the cost actually saved
Sales uplift — share of the incremental revenue generated
Processing time cut — rate based on the efficiency gained
models.footnote: If the promised outcome isn't hit, the performance share isn't invoiced.

approach.title: Our approach
approach.description: We don't sell generic training. We build with you. Working prototype in a few days, real-time iteration, fast path to production. A network of more than twenty experts — technical and business — available on demand.

pillars.title: Rapid prototyping
pillars.desc: From idea to tested prototype in days

pillars.title: Expert network
pillars.desc: 20+ technical and domain specialists on call

pillars.title: AI coaching
pillars.desc: Masterclasses and hands-on workshops for your teams

cases.title: Results
cases.footer: Hospitality, training, industry, trade, services… Every sector has its friction points. We identify and remove them.

claudeCode.title: Claude Code audit & setup
claudeCode.subtitle: One month to make Claude Code your business copilot. Audit, setup, workflows shipped, training, support.

deliverables.title: Audit + first workflow
deliverables.desc: Stack review, CLAUDE.md, memory, hooks, skills. First workflow in production by end of week.

deliverables.title: Two workflows shipped
deliverables.desc: CRM, automated research, invoicing, Telegram agent, outbound — we pick what unlocks the most for you.

deliverables.title: Two workflows + training
deliverables.desc: Two more workflows delivered plus a hands-on workshop with you or your team on real cases.

deliverables.title: Consolidation + autonomy
deliverables.desc: Roadmap so you operate solo, Slack/Telegram async support and two 30-min calls per week throughout the month.

claudeCode.target: For founders, agencies, IT consultancies and tech leaders who want to run their business with Claude Code rather than leaving it to the engineering team.

quote.text: “AI doesn't replace your teams. It gives them back the hours that bureaucracy steals.”

paul.name: Paul Larmaraud
paul.bio: Product vision and on-the-ground approach. Former global operations team at Lime. Led the acquisition of Groupe Seb, Nestlé, Carte Noire, SNCF at Arkel.

yukun.name: Yukun Leng
yukun.bio: Ten years at the heart of European luxury houses, including LVMH. Supply chain and process optimization expert between France and China.
